name: Calculatrice Placo
seo_title: Calculatrice Placo – Plaques, Enduit et Vis
seo_description: Calculez le nombre de plaques de plâtre, kg d'enduit et vis nécessaires. Entrez les dimensions du mur et la taille des plaques pour obtenir les quantités exactes.
description: Calculateur 1115. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
desc: Calculateur 1115. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
steps: Joint compound: ~0.5 kg/m² = 8 kg; Tape: ~1.5 m/m² = 24 m
mistakes: Calculezting only the net area without adding waste for cuts around outlets
Forgetting ceiling drywall — it uses the same sheet size but needs different screws
Not accounting for double-layer firewall requirements in some rooms
formula_display: Area = Length × Height × layers; Sheets = ceil(area ÷ sheet_size × 1.08)
